subtasks.description: Query budget allocation by product category with cost trends (current spend, YoY change, spend variance, category % of total). Include time-series aggregation to identify trending categories.
Analyze budget allocation results to identify underutilized vs. high-ROI categories, assess cost trends, and generate reallocation strategy recommendations with prioritization rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to fetch multi-category budget data with aggregations and trend calculations—requires joins across budget/category tables and window functions for YoY comparisons. (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to synthesize the SQL results into strategic recommendations; although this is single-source input, cross_recon is appropriate here because it includes classification (category performance tiers), posture assessment (allocation efficiency), and recommendation generation as part of reconciliation logic—all within its scope. Frontier tier not needed: SQL complexity is moderate (no extreme CTEs), and recommendation logic is analytical but not requiring multi-signal fusion. Small tier insufficient: budget analysis requires multiple aggregation dimensions and trend calculations; recommendation synthesis needs moderate reasoning depth.

output.sql: WITH current_year AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) as current_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) as transaction_days FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product), prior_year AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) as prior_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND event_date < '2024-01-01' GROUP BY product), monthly_trends AS (SELECT product, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)::DATE as month, SUM(amount_usd) as monthly_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2023-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)), variance_calc AS (SELECT product, STDDEV_POP(monthly_spend) as spend_variance, AVG(monthly_spend) as avg_monthly_spend FROM monthly_trends WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', month)::DATE >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY product), total_current AS (SELECT SUM(current_spend) as total_spend FROM current_year) SELECT cy.product, ROUND(cy.current_spend::NUMERIC, 2) as current_spend_usd, ROUND(COALESCE((cy.current_spend - py.prior_spend) / py.prior_spend * 100, 0)::NUMERIC, 2) as yoy_change_pct, ROUND(COALESCE(vc.spend_variance, 0)::NUMERIC, 2) as spend_variance, ROUND((cy.current_spend / tc.total_spend * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) as pct_of_total, COUNT(DISTINCT mt.month) as months_active FROM current_year cy LEFT JOIN prior_year py ON cy.product = py.product LEFT JOIN variance_calc vc ON cy.product = vc.product LEFT JOIN monthly_trends mt ON cy.product = mt.product AND mt.month >= '2024-01-01' CROSS JOIN total_current tc GROUP BY cy.product, cy.current_spend, py.prior_spend, vc.spend_variance, tc.total_spend ORDER BY cy.current_spend DESC
